Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Jijiang Construction Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Jijiang Construction Co., Ltd. presents a highly magical classification dislocation where a 'construction engineering company was forcibly categorized under electrical machinery manufacturing.' Since the underlying preset Apple Inc. data has been destroyed in the system, the engine confronts the original commercial archives directly. The official system seems to have been confused by the filler terms 'wire and cable manufacturing' and 'electrical machinery manufacturing' in its business license, categorizing it under 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the common-sense engine directly issued a physical veto: the enterprise is registered at 'Room 326, 3rd Floor,' Longfei Road, Yuhuatai District. Opening a cable manufacturing plant and heavy electrical equipment manufacturing in a 3rd-floor office is absolutely not permitted by common sense and building load-bearing limits. Extracting the core business clues of its 15 employees: the company is named 'Construction Co., Ltd.,' and the first permitted item on the license boldly states 'construction engineering design; construction engineering operations; installation and maintenance of power transmission, supply, and receiving facilities.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an equipment manufacturing plant, but a typical local 'construction engineering contractor and power engineering construction team.' The so-called manufacturing is merely to allow them to resell power equipment and cables under the guise of 'direct supply from the manufacturer' when taking on large power engineering projects (such as substation construction, municipal landscaping, weak current wiring), thereby obtaining a higher profit margin.
